description: Create a new health evaluation record in GNU Health for the existing patient Ana Betz documenting a workplace-related hand laceration. The evaluation must include the Chief Complaint 'Laceration on right hand from industrial machinery', the Present Illness 'Patient sustained a deep laceration on the right hand while operating a cutting machine at the workplace. Wound is approximately 4cm long. Bleeding was controlled with direct pressure prior to arrival', Evaluation Type 'Ambulatory', and Urgency 'Urgent'. GNU Health is accessible via Firefox at http://localhost:8000/ (admin/gnusolidario, database health50).
